creator: ryanrfrederick@gmail.com
text:
Building of net/libdnet 1.13 on 11.2-RELEASE amd64 fails with the following error:

Making all in check
--- check_addr.o ---
--- check_arp.o ---
--- check_blob.o ---
--- check_eth.o ---
--- check_arp.o ---
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../../include  -I../../include    -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -Wall -c -o check_arp.o c
heck_arp.c
--- check_addr.o ---
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../../include  -I../../include    -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -Wall -c -o check_addr.o 
check_addr.c
--- check_blob.o ---
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../../include  -I../../include    -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -Wall -c -o check_blob.o 
check_blob.c
--- check_eth.o ---
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../../include  -I../../include    -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -Wall -c -o check_eth.o c
heck_eth.c
--- check_addr.o ---
check_addr.c:16:10: fatal error: 'check.h' file not found
#include <check.h>
         ^~~~~~~~~
--- check_eth.o ---
check_eth.c:10:10: fatal error: 'check.h' file not found
#include <check.h>
         ^~~~~~~~~
--- check_blob.o ---
check_blob.c:10:10: fatal error: 'check.h' file not found
#include <check.h>
         ^~~~~~~~~
--- check_arp.o ---
check_arp.c:10:10: fatal error: 'check.h' file not found
#include <check.h>
         ^~~~~~~~~
--- check_blob.o ---
1 error generated.
--- check_arp.o ---
1 error generated.
